reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio muy bien ubicada sobre ruta 7 entrada a Carmen de Areco. Tiene lugar para descansar, tipo camping, árboles alrededor, y disponen de diversas comidas. Me gustó!

(Translated by Google)
A very well-located gas station on Route 7, the entrance to Carmen de Areco. It has a camping-style rest area, trees all around, and they serve a variety of foods. I liked it!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3NXBuXy1RRRAB
